note.body:
### Do you have at least 2 years of experience in corporate fields (marketing, sales, tech, ops, finance, customer service, product, etc)?

No


### Which of these best resonates with your #1 goal this year?

Swap current job for a higher paying remote job


### What's your current - or most recent - annual income/salary (in USD)?

$50-74K


### Where are you in the decision-making process on investing in support for your next role? 

If I find the right solution, I'm ready to get started immediately. I'm committed to finding my next role ASAP


### We offer guaranteed job placement for our clients. As such, we only work with highly qualified candidates. Why should we consider you for our program?

I have my MBA (August 2025), my bachelors in health services administration, and associates in radiologic technology. I also am a Certified Professional in Healthcare Quality. I’ve worked as an X-ray tech and mostly in reception roles until my current role as Clinic Director at a small nonprofit free health clinic for the last 2.5 years where I’ve onboarded 55+ volunteers and generally manage around 30 volunteers at a time, while being the head of all departments (quality, recruitment, HR, patient experience, patient safety, employee safety and all policies, marketing, outreach, social media management, website design, contracts management, initial process development, process improvement, national and statewide standards accreditation, government compliance, IT, etc.) as the only paid employee and dealing with a disconnected and ever dwindling volunteer board of directors (my bosses) who are generally more of a hindrance than a support yet I’ve kept the clinic running and completely switched our electronic health system completely my myself. I’m interested in report work, potentially in quality or safety, or patient experience. But open to switching out of healthcare and leaning more into my MBA in general. I was homeless at times getting my associates but was nominated to speak at the commencement ceremony and did. I retained a 4.0 institutional GPA during my bachelors degree while working full time nights as a single mom with an 8 month old when I started the degree. First in my family to do even an associates, horrible childhood home life. I was completely the odd one out in my MBA cohort but earned deep respect from my peers with what I brought to the table despite not knowing any of the names dropped by them or my professors. I know my stuff and I pick up what I need to quickly and with in depth understanding. I’m not sure this is the right service for me but I’m absolutely willing to put the work in to polish myself and learn anything to be more marketable for a high paying remote position. I’ve been overeducated and under experienced often in life and it’s time for my next role to make sure I don’t end up in that position again. I feel I’ve reached all that I can in my current role, and I will never be able to make what I need to be making in my role at the nonprofit. I don’t see myself staying in this role for 10 years to qualify for student loan forgiveness so I need to make money to be able to pay those loans back. If this is a good fit I look forward to connecting.


### What is your email?

rebeccawalke3@gmail.com


### What is your phone number?

+16088671117

note.body:
### Do you have at least 2 years of experience in corporate fields (marketing, sales, tech, ops, finance, customer service, product, etc)?

Yes!


### Which of these best resonates with your #1 goal this year?

Swap current job for a higher paying remote job


### What's your current - or most recent - annual income/salary (in USD)?

Under $50K


### Where are you in the decision-making process on investing in support for your next role? 

If I find the right solution, I'm ready to get started immediately. I'm committed to finding my next role ASAP


### We offer guaranteed job placement for our clients. As such, we only work with highly qualified candidates. Why should we consider you for our program?

You should consider me because I’m a rare blend of analytical, operational, and customer-focused experience, and I’m at a point in my career where the right guidance can accelerate my trajectory dramatically. I started my career at Allbirds during hyper-growth, where I built core retail systems from scratch, supported global expansion, and learned how to thrive in fast-moving, ambiguous environments. From there, I spent two years leading international work retreats across 24 countries—selling experiences, managing teams, negotiating partnerships, and strengthening my communication and relationship-building skills in a completely different context.

Most recently at Home Depot, I worked as a data analyst, building SQL models and dashboards that directly improved operations and internal customer satisfaction. Across all of these roles, the through-line is clear: I’m someone who learns fast, adapts quickly, and delivers results no matter the environment.

I’m now exploring operations, project management, product, or even tech sales—and I know I’d benefit enormously from a program that provides structure, accountability, and a clear strategy. I’m highly coachable, motivated, and ready to put in the work. With the right support, I’m confident I can land a strong role in 90 days and become one of your standout success stories.


### What is your email?

agapusan18@gmail.com


### What is your phone number?

+19733425539

### We offer guaranteed job placement for our clients. As such, we only work with highly qualified candidates. Why should we consider you for our program?

already do the heavy lifting that Frontend Future trains for: in my current Software Engineer I role at Idemia-NSS I own feature design, code quality, automation, and production support across a Spring Boot stack, the same engineering discipline I’d bring to advanced UI work once I level up my frontend depth. Outside of work I’ve shipped TypeScript/Next.js products such as the AveryLightfx show-control platform and the You’re Being Robbed financial data experience, plus AI-driven side projects, so I’m already iterating quickly on modern React tooling and shipping to real users.[^2] I pair that hands-on momentum with a Computer Science B.S. from West Virginia University and competitive scholarships, showing I can grind through high expectations while staying coachable. I’m looking to accelerate with the help of your program, and your 1-on-1 mentorship would let me convert my full-stack foundation and product instincts into polished interface craftsmanship fast exactly the gap I’m motivated to close.


### What is your email?

jscottwv@gmail.com
